title: Weak Diffeomorphisms and Extremals for Scalar Conservation Laws
summary:
Scalar conservation laws in one space variable allow a Lagrangian (particle path) formulation. The Lagrangian trajectory in the infinite-dimensional group of diffeomorphisms on the physical space can be written as a system of conservation laws. The relation between solutions of the Cauchy problem for the conservation law and solutions of the corresponding Cauchy problem on the diffeomorphism group extends to weak solutions of the coresponding problems. The correspondence between particle paths and transport equations is analogous to that between a Lie group and the corresponding Lie algebra.
  This paper establishes that for scalar conservation laws the particle paths are extremals of an action functional on the space of diffeomorphisms; that is, they are geodesics in some metric. In some examples of systems of conservation laws, including the physical example of isentropic gas dynamics in one space dimension, diffeomorphism representations also exist and may be interpreted as extremals of action functionals.

AI.tldr: 建立了标量守恒律的粒子路径是微分同胚群上作用泛函的极值点，即某种度量下的测地线
AI.motivation: 研究标量守恒律的拉格朗日（粒子路径）表述，探索守恒律与微分同胚群上测地线结构之间的深层联系
AI.techniques: 拉格朗日表述、微分同胚群理论、作用泛函变分原理、测地线分析、守恒律系统与Lie群-Lie代数对应
AI.main_theorems: 证明标量守恒律的粒子路径是微分同胚群空间上作用泛函的极值点（测地线）；部分守恒律系统（如一维等熵气体动力学）也存在微分同胚表示并可解释为作用泛函极值点
AI.significance: 为守恒律理论提供了新的几何视角，建立了流体动力学与微分几何的深刻联系，可能为数值方法和理论分析提供新工具

title: The global well-posedness of the multi-dimensional compressible Euler system with damping in the $L^p$ critical Besov spaces for $p<2$
summary: In this paper, we study the Cauchy's problem of the compressible Euler system with damping and establish the global-in-time well-posedness in $L^p$-type critical Besov spaces for $1\leq p<2$. To achieve it, a new product estimate is established in $L^2$-$L^p$ hybrid Besov spaces.

AI.tldr: 建立了带阻尼可压缩欧拉系统在L^p型临界Besov空间中的全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究带阻尼的可压缩欧拉系统柯西问题，该模型在流体力学中描述有摩擦的可压缩流体运动，阻尼项代表能量耗散机制
AI.techniques: 建立了L^2-L^p混合Besov空间中的新乘积估计，这是处理非线性项的关键技术；使用临界Besov空间框架分析全局适定性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当1≤p<2时，带阻尼可压缩欧拉系统在L^p型临界Besov空间中存在全局解且解唯一
AI.significance: 扩展了可压缩欧拉系统适定性理论到更一般的函数空间，特别是L^p型临界Besov空间；为研究带阻尼流体模型的长期行为提供了新工具

title: Global three-dimensional subsonic Euler flows past an axisymmetric obstacle with large vorticity
comment: 35 pages, 3 figures. All comments are welcome
summary: In this paper, we prove the existence and uniqueness of subsonic solutions to the steady Euler flows past a smooth, axisymmetric obstacle. Specifically, for a broad class of prescribed positive axial velocities in the upstream, the subsonic Euler flow exists provided that the upstream density exceeds a critical threshold. The non-degeneracy of the axial velocity is rigorously established by combining the strong maximum principle with a refined continuity argument. The asymptotic behavior of the flow is obtained from uniform integral estimates for the difference between the flow and the upstream state. In addition, this result accommodates flows with large vorticity under a structural condition, thereby differing from previous results in the two-dimensional case.

AI.tldr: 证明了轴对称障碍物前定常欧拉流亚音速解的存在唯一性，建立了上游密度临界阈值条件
AI.motivation: 研究轴对称障碍物前的定常欧拉流动，解决亚音速解的存在性和唯一性问题，特别是处理具有大涡量的流动情况
AI.techniques: 强极值原理与精细连续性论证结合建立轴向速度非退化性，通过一致积分估计获得流动渐近行为
AI.main_theorems: 对于一类给定的正轴向速度，当上游密度超过临界阈值时，亚音速欧拉流存在且唯一；结果可容纳满足结构条件的大涡量流动
AI.significance: 将二维结果推广到轴对称情形，处理了更复杂的涡量结构，为空气动力学中轴对称流动问题提供了严格数学基础

title: Uniform Stability of Oscillatory Shocks for KdV-Burgers Equation
summary: In this paper, we study the viscous-dispersive shock profile with infinite oscillations of the Korteweg-de Vries-Burgers (KdVB) equation. First, we establish detail structures of the shock wave, including the rate at which the local extrema converge to the left end state towards the left far field. Then, by exploiting the structural properties of the shock, we show the $L^2$ contraction property of the shock profile under arbitrarily large perturbations, up to a time-dependent shift. This result implies both time-asymptotic stability and uniform stability with respect to the viscosity and dispersion coefficients. This uniformity yields zero viscosity-dispersion limits.

AI.tldr: 建立了KdVB方程粘性-色散激波剖面在任意大扰动下的L^2收缩性质，证明了时间渐近稳定性和关于粘性-色散系数的均匀稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究Korteweg-de Vries-Burgers (KdVB) 方程中具有无限振荡的粘性-色散激波剖面结构，这类剖面在左远场呈现无限振荡特性，需要深入理解其精细结构和稳定性
AI.techniques: 激波剖面精细结构分析、局部极值收敛速率估计、利用激波结构性质证明L^2收缩性质、时间依赖平移技术、均匀稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了激波剖面的详细结构，包括局部极值向左端状态收敛的速率；2) 证明了在任意大扰动下，激波剖面具有L^2收缩性质（模时间依赖平移）；3) 得到了时间渐近稳定性和关于粘性-色散系数的均匀稳定性；4) 由此得到零粘性-色散极限
AI.significance: 这是对KdVB方程激波剖面稳定性的重要进展，首次处理了具有无限振荡特性的剖面在任意大扰动下的稳定性问题，均匀稳定性结果为粘性-色散极限提供了严格数学基础

title: Circle-like concentrated solutions for two-component Bose-Einstein condensates

AI.tldr: 研究二维BEC系统中L^2约束下同步解的存在性，构造在高维子集上集中的向量径向解
AI.motivation: 研究双组分玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体(BEC)系统中具有L^2约束的归一化解，填补高维集中归一化解在系统中的空白
AI.techniques: 有限维约化方法结合局部Pohozaev恒等式，构造在圆上集中的向量径向解
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意α>0, γ>0和β在特定区间内，证明了同步解的存在性，这些解在二维空间的高维子集上集中，特别是当(α+γ-2β)/(αγ-β²)→0时构造在圆上集中的向量径向解
AI.significance: 填补了BEC系统中高维集中归一化解的理论空白，为多组分量子系统提供了新的数学分析框架

title: Generically sharp decay and blowing up at infinity for a weak null wave system
summary:
We study a system of semilinear wave equations satisfying the weak null condition, which can be regarded as a simplified model for the Einstein vacuum equations. The main objective is to establish precise pointwise decay estimates, as both lower and upper bounds of decay, for small data solutions. Specifically, we show that the difference between the solution and its leading-order term is dominated by lower-order terms that decay faster in the retarded time variable $u=t-r$. Moreover, we prove that these pointwise decay estimates are sharp for a generic class of small initial data decaying sufficiently fast.
  As applications of these estimates, we demonstrate that the energy of one component of the solution admits a lower bound that generically grows to infinity as $t\to +\infty$, which can be interpreted as ``blowing up at infinity." Furthermore, we verify that this component generically exhibits an energy cascade from high to low frequencies.

AI.tldr: 建立了满足弱零条件的半线性波动方程组小数据解的精确点态衰减估计，证明了衰减的上下界，并发现了能量在无穷远处"爆破"和能量从高频向低频的级联现象。
AI.motivation: 研究满足弱零条件的半线性波动方程组，该方程组可作为爱因斯坦真空方程的简化模型。主要目标是建立小数据解的精确点态衰减估计，包括衰减的上下界，以深入理解这类方程的解在无穷远处的渐近行为。
AI.techniques: 使用点态衰减估计方法，分析解与其主导项之间的差异在延迟时间变量u=t-r中的衰减行为；建立精确的上下界估计；应用能量方法和频率分析技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了小数据解的精确点态衰减估计（上下界）；2. 证明解与其主导项的差异被低阶项控制，且在延迟时间变量u中衰减更快；3. 证明这些点态衰减估计对于一类充分衰减的小初始数据是尖锐的；4. 发现解的一个分量能量存在下界，该下界在t→∞时趋于无穷（"无穷远处爆破"）；5. 验证该分量存在从高频到低频的能量级联现象。
AI.significance: 为满足弱零条件的波动方程提供了精确的衰减估计，深化了对爱因斯坦真空方程简化模型的理解；发现的"无穷远处爆破"现象和能量级联效应揭示了这类方程解的新颖渐近行为，对广义相对论和波动方程理论有重要意义。

title: The regularity of the boundary of vortex patches for the quasi-geostrophic shallow-water equations
summary: We prove the persistence of boundary smoothness of vortex patches for the quasi-geostrophic shallow-water (QGSW) equations. The QGSW equations generalize the Euler equations by including an additional parameter, the Rossby radius $\varepsilon^{-1}$, which modifies the relationship between the streamfunction and the (potential) vorticity. In addition, we prove that solutions of the QGSW equations converge locally in time to the corresponding Euler solutions as $\varepsilon \to 0$ in little Hölder spaces.

AI.tldr: 证明了准地转浅水方程中涡旋斑块边界光滑性的持久性，并建立了当Rossby半径趋于无穷时解向Euler方程解的局部时间收敛性。
AI.motivation: 准地转浅水方程是Euler方程的推广，包含Rossby半径参数ε⁻¹，该参数改变了流函数与（位势）涡度之间的关系。研究涡旋斑块边界光滑性的持久性对于理解这类方程的动力学行为具有重要意义，同时建立与Euler方程的渐近联系有助于理解两个方程系统之间的关系。
AI.techniques: 使用小Hölder空间中的局部时间收敛分析，处理包含Rossby半径参数的广义涡度-流函数关系，证明边界光滑性的持久性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 准地转浅水方程涡旋斑块边界光滑性的持久性定理；2. 当ε→0时，准地转浅水方程解在局部时间内向对应Euler方程解在小Hölder空间中的收敛性定理。
AI.significance: 该结果建立了准地转浅水方程与经典Euler方程之间的重要联系，为理解包含Rossby半径效应的流体动力学提供了理论基础，同时扩展了涡旋斑块理论到更一般的方程框架中。

title: Long finite time bubble trees for two co-rotational wave maps
summary: We show that the energy critical Wave Maps equation from $\mathbb{R}^{2+1}$ into $\mathbb{S}^2$, restricted to the $k=2$ co-rotational setting, admits arbitrarily large numbers of concentrating concentric $n$ bubble profiles. For any $n\in\mathbb{N}$, we construct an $n$-bubble solution concentrating at scales $λ_1(t)\gg λ_2(t)\gg \ldots\gg λ_n(t)$, where $λ_n(t)=t^{-1}\vert \log t\vert^β$, and $λ_j(t)\gtrsim \exp( \int_t^{t_0} λ_{j+1}(s)ds)$, for any $j<n$. Here $β>\tfrac32$ is a parameter that can be chosen arbitrarily. This shows that, as far as finite time blow-up case is concerned, the entirety of cases postulated in the soliton resolution theorem indeed occur, provided the concentric collapsing bubbles have alternating signs.

AI.tldr: 证明了能量临界波映射方程在k=2共旋转对称性下存在任意多层的同心气泡解，这些解在有限时间内以交替符号的方式坍缩
AI.motivation: 研究能量临界波映射方程在有限时间爆破情况下的解结构，特别是验证孤子分解定理中假设的所有情况确实存在，重点关注同心坍缩气泡的构造
AI.techniques: 使用多层气泡构造方法，通过尺度参数λ_j(t)的层次结构控制气泡坍缩，利用交替符号条件确保稳定性，参数β>3/2可任意选择
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意n∈ℕ，构造了n层气泡解，尺度满足λ_n(t)=t^{-1}|log t|^β且λ_j(t)≳exp(∫_t^{t_0} λ_{j+1}(s)ds)，这些解以交替符号的同心气泡形式在有限时间内坍缩
AI.significance: 首次证明了孤子分解定理中假设的所有有限时间爆破情况确实存在，为波映射方程解结构的完整理解提供了关键证据，展示了多层气泡结构的丰富性

title: Long-time propagation of coherent states in a normally hyperbolic setting
summary: We present a method to find asymptotics for the evolution of coherent states (or Gaussian wavepackets with standard deviation $\sqrt{h}$) under semiclassical Schrödinger's equation for a given Hamiltonian. These results extend the work of Combescure and Robert, in which the evolution of coherent states can be approximated in the limit $h\to 0$ with deformed Gaussian wavepackets called squeezed coherent states. The description with squeezed states holds for times $t$ that can go to infinity as $h\to 0$, under the constraint $|t|\leq |\log h|/(6λ_0)$ where $λ_0$ is the maximal Lyapunov exponent of the classical dynamics. The breakdown of this approximation at time $|\log h|/(6λ_0)$ is related to the bending of evolved wavepackets: once propagated states spread at a scale $h^{1/3}$, squeezed states no longer provide an appropriate description. To obtain a representation of propagated states valid up to times $|t|\leq C|\log h|$ with a larger $C$ (for instance, up to Ehrenfest's time $|\log h|/(2λ_0)$ where spreading on macroscopic scales is allowed), we make additional assumptions on the flow $Φ_t$ associated to the classical dynamics, imposing constraints on directions of elongation. Namely, we work in a neighborhood of a normally hyperbolic $Φ_t$-invariant submanifold $K$, on which the dynamics is considered as slow in comparison with its transverse directions, along which $Φ_t$ is assumed to be hyperbolic. In this context, we describe the propagated state as a WKB state in transverse directions and a squeezed state along $K$. This description emphasizes the fact that propagated states should no longer be thought of as microlocalized on a point, but rather on an isotropic submanifold (corresponding to transverse unstable directions). Guillemin, Uribe, and Wang presented a similar class of wavefunctions microlocalized on an isotropic submanifold.

AI.tldr: 提出了在Ehrenfest时间尺度下相干态演化的渐近描述方法，结合WKB态和压缩态表示
AI.motivation: 研究半经典薛定谔方程下相干态的长时间演化，突破Combescure和Robert工作中|t|≤|log h|/(6λ₀)的时间限制，寻求在Ehrenfest时间尺度|t|≤C|log h|下的有效描述
AI.techniques: 结合压缩相干态和WKB方法，利用法向双曲不变子流形理论，在横向方向采用WKB态描述，沿不变子流形采用压缩态描述
AI.main_theorems: 建立了在Ehrenfest时间尺度下相干态演化的渐近表示：在法向双曲不变子流形K的邻域内，传播态可表示为横向方向的WKB态和沿K方向的压缩态的组合
AI.significance: 突破了半经典量子动力学中相干态演化的时间限制，为理解量子混沌和Ehrenfest时间尺度下的量子-经典对应提供了新框架，将传播态从点状微局域化推广到各向同性子流形上的微局域化
